transitions.guard: essential system information is valid and up to date, or sidelink condition in 5.3.3.1a is met
actions: start_timer(T300)
send_message(RRCSetupRequest,establishmentCause)
set establishmentCause from upper layers or mps-PriorityAccess
submit RRCSetupRequest to lower layers
if T390 is running then stop_timer(T390)
perform cell group configuration using masterCellGroup
perform radio bearer configuration using radioBearerConfig
stop_timer(T300)
stop_timer(T301)
stop_timer(T319)
if T319a is running then stop_timer(T319a)
if T390 is running then stop_timer(T390)
if T302 is running then stop_timer(T302)
stop_timer(T320)
if T331 is running then stop_timer(T331)
enter RRC_CONNECTED
perform L2 U2N Remote UE configuration using sl-L2RemoteUE-Config
perform sidelink dedicated configuration using sl-ConfigDedicatedNR
send_message(RRCSetupComplete,registeredAMF,plmnIdentity,amf-Identifier,dedicatedNAS-Message,mobilityState)

transitions.guard: response to RRCResumeRequest, RRCResumeRequest1, or RRCReestablishmentRequest
actions: if T380 is running then stop_timer(T380)
perform cell group configuration using masterCellGroup
perform radio bearer configuration using radioBearerConfig
stop_timer(T300)
stop_timer(T301)
stop_timer(T319)
if T319a is running then stop_timer(T319a)
if T390 is running then stop_timer(T390)
if T302 is running then stop_timer(T302)
stop_timer(T320)
if response was to RRCResumeRequest or RRCResumeRequest1 then if T331 is running then stop_timer(T331)
if response was to RRCResumeRequest or RRCResumeRequest1 then enter RRC_CONNECTED
perform L2 U2N Remote UE configuration using sl-L2RemoteUE-Config
perform sidelink dedicated configuration using sl-ConfigDedicatedNR
send_message(RRCSetupComplete,dedicatedNAS-Message,mobilityState)
handle RRCReject
if temporary offset failure handling condition is met then handle establishment failure
L2 U2N Relay UE indicates upper layers or send_message(NotificationMessageSidelink)

transitions.guard: UE has not yet entered RRC_CONNECTED
actions: if T300 is running then stop_timer(T300)
L2 U2N Relay UE indicates upper layers or send_message(NotificationMessageSidelink)
